title: Animusika
description: The annual culminating concert of the Manila Campus' University Vision-Mission Week

comments.author: Maria S.
comments.text: The lineup looks amazing, can't wait!

comments.author: Carlo T.
comments.text: Is there still a way to register?

comments.author: Angela P.
comments.text: Learned a lot from last year's session.

title: Inter-University InfoSec Conference
description: An InfoSec conference co-hosted with ROOTCON, featuring talks on ethical hacking, exploit development, and malware analysis, capped off with a Capture the Flag (CTF) competition open to students.
